criteria.text: PR is open from gh-pages into main and is not merged
cssMemeSlider folder exists in gh-pages and the deployment is accessible
At least 5 commits in history
Commits follow the naming convention and each includes a timestamp
PR link was submitted
PR description follows the schema and lists all tested resolutions
Slider is centered with equal margins on both sides
Correct layout of images, captions, and controls (matches design)
Smooth animated transition between images
Smooth animated transition between captions
Captions are plain text strings (not part of the image)
Each control has a clickable area larger than the control itself
Controls have interactive states: hover, active, active slide indicator, cursor change
Mobile version is present and layout of images, captions, and controls is correct
Only relative units are used; slider is fluid across screen sizes
All slider components are in the normal document flow; position is static only; no float
No CSS pseudo-elements are used (pseudo-classes are allowed)
JavaScript or external libraries are used
Obfuscated (non-human-readable) CSS or HTML
Plagiarism
